title: Sorghum breeding - A projection
abstract: The Opportunity available to the sorghum program of ICRISAT has expanded substantially in the last year, Beside the station at ouagadouguou upper Volta, a sorghum breeder has been stationed at Mad Madani, Sudan, Ilonga, Tanzania, and it  is anticipated that a sorghum breeder will be stationed with in the ICRISAT program at Samaru, Nigeria. A program is also developing that will focus on the higher elevation situation primarily in Ethipopia and Kenya. ICRISAT has sorghum breeder station at CIMMYT in mExico; however this paper concentrates on India and Africa
